title: Non-record: GPT + QAT int8 — 1.2600 BPB (1x RTX 4090, 60min)
author: CarlosItp
body:
## Summary
GPT baseline with Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) using int8 straight-through estimator.

## Results
- val_bpb: 1.25996347
- artifact_size: 15,857,763 bytes (15.86 MB)
- Training: 16,327 steps, 60 minutes on 1x RTX 4090
- GPU: 1x RTX 4090 (Non-record submission)

## Changes
- Added QAT int8 simulation in CastedLinear.forward() using straight-through estimator
- Trains model to be robust to post-training int8 quantization
